---
title: "Dashboards"
---

Small interactive dashboards built on lakehouse data.

```{=html}
<div class="card-grid">
  <a href="departments/index.html" class="card">
    <h3>🏛️ Population by Department</h3>
    <p>Explore population trends for all 107 French departments from 1968 to 2023.</p>
  </a>
</div>

<style>
.card-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(300px, 1fr));
  gap: 1.5rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}
.card {
  display: block;
  padding: 1.5rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color, #dee2e6);
  border-radius: 8px;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: inherit;
  transition: box-shadow 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
}
.card:hover {
  box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}
.card h3 {
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
  font-size: 1.2rem;
}
.card p {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--bs-secondary-color, #6c757d);
  font-size: 0.95rem;
}
</style>
```
